event: Ivan III addressing subjects from a palace
symbols: elevated platform — royal authority and separation between ruler and subjects
onion domes in background — Russian Orthodox faith and Muscovite civilization
crowd below — the people subject to princely authority
arched architecture — grandeur of the Muscovite court
description: A black-and-white illustration depicting a scene of medieval Russian court life. A regal figure identified as Ivan III stands elevated on a stepped platform beneath ornate arched architecture, addressing or receiving a gathered crowd below. The background reveals onion-domed churches characteristic of Russian Orthodox architecture. The crowd includes figures in various medieval Russian garments — boyars, clergy, and common people. The composition emphasizes the vertical separation between ruler and subjects.
